content: 2025 state-of-the-art active learning memory agents can be rearchitected to treat the entire agent design space itself as a learnable environment, where the agent actively selects which of its own architectural components (memory banks, curiosity modules, active sampling heuristics) to update instead of just updating downstream task models. This creates a self-improving agent that continually curates its own structure to adapt to open-ended tasks, rather than being statically designed by human engineers.
source_topics: active learning memory agent SOTA deep 2025
